name: New Pattern Proposal
about: Propose a new context engineering pattern or anti-pattern
title: "[Pattern] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Pattern Name

<!-- A concise, descriptive name -->

## Category

<!-- Which category does this belong in? -->
- [ ] Core pattern (e.g., context management, retrieval, prompt structure)
- [ ] Integration pattern (e.g., tool use, multi-agent, external systems)
- [ ] Anti-pattern (common mistake to avoid)
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## Problem

What problem does this pattern solve? When does a developer encounter this issue?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the pattern. How does it work? What are the key design decisions?

## Code Examples

Provide a brief example if possible. Final submissions should include both Python and TypeScript, but a proposal in one language is fine.

```python
# Python example (optional at proposal stage)
```

```typescript
// TypeScript example (optional at proposal stage)
```

## Trade-offs

What are the costs or limitations of this approach?

## Related Patterns

Does this build on, replace, or complement any existing patterns in the handbook?

## Real-World Context

Have you used this pattern in production? Briefly describe the use case and outcome if so.
